user.title: Set up JSON Sensor
user.description: Configure a URL that returns a JSON payload conforming to the JSON Sensor schema.

data_description.url: The endpoint that returns the JSON payload
data_description.name: Display name for this integration instance
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the endpoint, in seconds (minimum 5)
data_description.prefix: Optional prefix prepended to device names and entity IDs
data_description.headers: Optional HTTP headers. Use JSON ({"Key": "Value"}) or one "Key: Value" per line

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the endpoint
error.invalid_payload: Endpoint response does not match the expected schema
error.invalid_headers: Headers could not be parsed — use JSON or "Key: Value" lines

abort.already_configured: This integration instance is already configured
